name: Pan Roasted Pork Loins w/ Onions, Bell Peppers & Crema Cent
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all marinade ingredients well and store in an airtight container.
2. Dry rub the pork loins with the spice mixture.
3. Marinate the meat overnight.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Sear the pork loins in a hot pan until browned on both sides.
6. Place the pork loins in the oven and roast for 15 minutes.
7. Serve the roasted pork on a platter.
8. Sauté the onions and bell peppers until just tender.
9. Spoon the sautéed vegetables over the pork.
10. Drizzle with Crema Centroamericana before serving.
